# ORACLE LUNAR

> Your AI best friend, always here for you. A free all-in-one AI companion app: voice oracle, AI tutor, mind & wellness hub, crisis support, photography, marketing, app builder and more.

ORACLE LUNAR is a cinematic, mobile-first AI super-app. Core chat and voice companion features are free for life. Premium generations (avatars, video, voice cloning) use a pay-per-use credit wallet so users only pay for what they create.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Landing page and app entry.
- [About](/about): What ORACLE LUNAR is and who it's for.
- [Dashboard](/dashboard): Main super-app grid of 40+ modules.
- [Oracle](/oracle): Voice + chat AI companion.
- [AI Companion](/ai-companion): Conversational AI friend.
- [AI Tutor](/ai-tutor): Personalized learning companion.
- [Mind Hub](/mind-hub): Wellness, journaling and mental health tools.
- [Crisis Hub](/crisis-hub): Immediate emotional support resources.
- [Photography Hub](/photography-hub): AI photo studio, brand kit, logos.
- [Marketing Hub](/marketing-hub): AI marketing copy, social assets.
- [Voice Studio](/voice-studio): 120+ voices and voice cloning.
- [Avatar Generator](/avatar-generator): 8K AI avatars.
- [Live Vision](/live-vision): Real-time camera analysis.
- [App Builder](/app-builder): Multi-agent autonomous app generator.
- [Movie Studio Pro](/movie-studio-pro): AI cinematic video generation.
- [Story Writer](/story-writer): Long-form AI story creation.
- [Calendar](/calendar): Life diary and AI reminders.
- [Wallet](/wallet): Credits, top-ups and payouts.
- [Subscribe](/subscribe): Plans and pricing.
- [Creators](/creators): Creator shop and revenue share.
- [Investor](/investor): Investor information.
- [Referral](/referral): Invite friends and earn credits.
- [Safety Center](/safety-center): Safety, moderation and policies.

## Optional

- [Privacy Policy](/privacy-policy): How user data is handled.
- [Terms of Service](/terms-of-service): Terms of use.
